step1.title: Create an account
step1.subtitle: We'll set up your profile, stack and walk you through the first kata. Under 3 minutes.

step2.title: What do you write?
step2.subtitle: Pick up to 3 languages — we'll tailor kata, duels and leaderboards to your stack.

step3.title: Let's solve the first kata together
step3.subtitle: No rush: from problem to submit, with a tour of the interface and shortcuts.
step3.f1_sub: We'll cover every UI block — nothing skipped
step3.f2_sub: Tests first, submit second — like real engineers
step3.f3_sub: First kata, first reward, first leaderboard entry
step3.task_text: Given an array of numbers and a target. Return indexes of two numbers that sum to target. Each number used once.
step3.tooltip_sub: Don't worry — nobody sees your fails

step4.tag: AI MENTOR · NO LP, NO TIMER
step4.title: Master your first pattern with the AI mentor
step4.subtitle: AI watches how you solve, hints in the moment, explains mistakes. This is not a fight — it's growth sparring.
step4.ready_sub: After sparring you'll get the pattern in your Codex and access to ranked mode.
